title: NdjsonStreamLine
description: Wire format for multi-query `--stream` mode (v1.0+): each stdout/file line is ONE complete SearchOutput object as compact (non-pretty) JSON, terminated by a single LF (`\n`). NDJSON/JSONL are treated as synonyms. Pretty-print is forbidden. Same object shape as search-output.schema.json. Agent metadata on each line sets `metadados.stream_solicitado=true` and `metadados.stream_efetivo=true` when streaming actually emits. Single-query `--stream` is ignored (warning; stream_efetivo=false). Content-Type for HTTP would be `application/x-ndjson` (alias `application/jsonl`); this CLI writes to stdout or `--output` append.
